decision_target: Choose the managed Claude session transport and lifecycle
evidence_refs_or_hashes: command:printf stream-json user message | claude -p --verbose --input-format stream-json --output-format stream-json --tools '' --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence
questions_answered: The stream emits init, assistant, rate-limit, result, hook, session-id, cost, and permission-denial data
Roots, allowed tools, permission mode, session id, resume, and cancellation-relevant process ownership are explicit CLI controls
questions_unanswered: Exact multi-turn stdin lifetime and interrupt acknowledgement behavior
Whether session resume or one long-lived process gives the safer recovery boundary
next_step: Independent replay and lifecycle-focused follow-up probe before implementation
